cards.back: Budget At Completion — total approved project budget from start to finish.
Planned Value — the budget value of work planned to be done by a specific date. Shows what was scheduled.
Earned Value — the budget value of work actually completed. Formula: EV = BAC × (% of work actually done)
Actual Cost — the actual cost of work completed. What you have really spent.
CV = EV - AC. Positive = under budget (good). Negative = over budget (bad).
SV = EV - PV. Positive = ahead of schedule (good). Negative = behind schedule (bad).
CPI = EV / AC. >1 = under budget (efficient). <1 = over budget (inefficient). Shows cost efficiency ratio.
SPI = EV / PV. >1 = ahead of schedule. <1 = behind schedule. Shows schedule efficiency ratio.
Estimate At Completion — forecast of total project cost. Formula: EAC = BAC / CPI. Assumes current efficiency continues.
Estimate To Complete — remaining cost from now to end. Formula: ETC = EAC - AC
Variance At Completion — projected over/under budget at project end. Formula: VAC = BAC - EAC. Negative = will overrun.
To-Complete Performance Index — cost efficiency needed for remaining work to finish within budget. Formula: TCPI = (BAC-EV)/(BAC-AC)
